_comment: Caddy on-disk persistence demo. After a verified apply, crenel mirrors its managed routes into caddy_persist_path (additively, between sentinels), validates, and reloads with `caddy reload --config <path>`. Closes the admin-API durability gap: routes survive a `docker restart`. With a fake_seed (no-infra demo) crenel uses a no-exec CLI that logs the reload it would run; a real edge uses the caddy binary. Copy examples/Caddyfile.base to a writable path and point caddy_persist_path at it.
